title: cyperus ciliatopilosus var. longifolius
intro: Cyperus ciliatopilosus var. longifolius is a variety of sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family, known for its distinctive long leaves and ciliate leaf sheaths. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyperus ciliatopilosus var. longifolius include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
